title: Economic Activity, Prices, and Monetary Policy in Japan
interpretation: The official event is represented by ANAS as a monetary_policy, macro_growth, inflation, trade_policy exposure with currency pressure around JPY, USD, CHF, EUR. In the 7_day window, FrictionGraph's largest standalone RMSD chain is EUR -> SGD -> JPY -> EUR, while the strongest event-overlap chain is USD -> SGD -> JPY -> USD. These are different chains, which helps separate broad market stress from event-specific currency-chain alignment.
caution: This case links official-event exposure to nearby FrictionGraph chain behavior. It is an explanatory alignment record, not a causal claim or trading signal.
